text: Anthropic's AI platform Claude has ended the use of Pro and Max subscriptions for powering third-party agentic tools like Open Claw, shifting to usage-based billing for these tools. This policy change follows a major source code leak of Claude Code, which led to a rapid open-source rewrite and increased competition. The move has caused significant backlash from developers and users who relied on these third-party tools, marking a shift in AI service monetization and sparking discussions about the future of agentic AI platforms and open-source alternatives. Concurrently, an autonomous AI agent named GAJAE is credited with driving the rapid open-source rewrite and has launched its own token, symbolizing the agentic AI revolution.
author: elfa_2040251396017303800

text: Market and macro narratives highlight a maturing crypto ecosystem where easy money from hype and airdrops is over, and real value is shifting towards infrastructure, revenue-generating projects, and real-world assets (RWAs). Stablecoins have surpassed the US ACH system in transaction volume, signaling a shift in financial infrastructure. The crypto market is concentrating liquidity and capital at top platforms like Binance and Hyperliquid, with derivatives trading dominating over spot. Investors are advised to focus on positioning, understanding, and execution rather than hype, with an emphasis on projects with real utility and sustainable revenue streams.
author: elfa_2040527369052798998

text: Hyperliquid ecosystem developments include the launch of the first Vietnamese Dong (VND) onramp via QR code, enabling instant USDC deposits from banking apps, and the opening of additional early access spots for Liquidiction, a prediction market platform integrated with Hyperliquid. The platform is also seeing increased usage and liquidity, with reports of significant profits from trading perpetuals and growing community engagement. Hyperliquid is recognized as a key infrastructure for decentralized perpetual trading and prediction markets, with ongoing weekly token unlocks and emissions.
author: elfa_2040550665546526860

text: Hyperliquid ($HYPE) continues to dominate the on-chain perpetuals decentralized exchange (DEX) market with a 64% market share, showing strong expansion into commodities and equity perpetuals. The recently passed HIP-3 proposal significantly contributes to over 30% of total trading volume, and the upcoming HIP-4 mainnet launch is highly anticipated. Hyperliquid's deflationary tokenomics feature daily buybacks and burns, creating a self-adjusting supply mechanism that stabilizes price pressure. The platform is attracting institutional and retail interest, with growing liquidity and user base, and is considered a leading on-chain derivatives venue challenging centralized exchanges.
author: elfa_2040575223574003822

text: INTEL: The Strait of Hormuz will not return to its previous state Spokesperson of the Parliament Presidium stated: The Strait of Hormuz has become a strategic advantage for Iran under the new security conditions and will no longer revert to its former status. The management of this important waterway is in the hands of the Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran, and no country has the right to pass through it without Iran's permission. Iran will defend this strategic position with all its military power. The enemies thought they could destroy Iran's navy, but the armed forces were not only not weakened, they became more experienced on the battlefield and identified new capabilities.
